caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a high bun and wearing black headphones is seated in a recording studio. She is dressed in a black t-shirt and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a screen displays the name "ohnson" and a sign on the wall reads "Employees Only." A logo on the screen and overlaying the image includes the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST," accompanied by a graphic of a microphone. The woman maintains a slight smile and a steady gaze toward someone off-screen, with very little physical movement across the sequence. The setting remains static, with the lighting and composition constant throughout the frames, capturing her listening or waiting to speak during a podcast recording session.
